{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the main contribution as both the SG-Constraint suite and the demonstration of tube-MPC dominating current safe-RL baselines, but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (the headline empirical claim) but not for others.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the methodological contribution rather than the scope.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the main contribution as both the SG-Constraint suite and the demonstration of tube-MPC dominating current safe-RL baselines, but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (the headline empirical claim) but not for others.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the methodological contribution rather than the scope.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
